mads.note: Kyūjitai: 小平總治. For his rubbing-collection, see sources: , , ,
TM1 and TM2 are mentioned on 26-27, 48 but not in , so these two rubbings were not preserved in the Kodaira bunko 小平文庫, but went somewhere else?

Furthermore, Kodaira seems to have written at least one book about Chinese Calligraphy. A Exemplar is preserved at the Torii bunko 鳥居文庫, Hakuunzan Torii kannon 白雲山鳥居観音 in Naguri, Hannō-shi, Saitama Prefecture 埼玉県飯能市上名栗. See: http://www.toriikannon.org/meisyo/toriibunko.html and 111: 支那書道略説，小平総治，発行所不明，出版年不明. Kodaira Sōji 小平総治. “Shina shodō ryakusetsu 支那書道略説 [Brief Summary of Chinese Callgraphy]”. Place of Publication unknown, date of publication unknown
